title: LightUp
body:
*Another one of my quality of life random ideas...*

**Light up all your surroundings naturally with one command!**
<iframe width="840" height="473" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/8qir6vasLp4"></iframe>

There is [CoreProtect](https://modrinth.com/plugin/coreprotect) integration so you can always roll back actions.

### Dependencies:
[CommandAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/commandapi/)

### Commands:
- /lightup reload [Permission: lightup.reload]
- /lightup <block> <min_light_level> <range> <include_skylight> <lightup_type> [Permission: lightup.use]
- /lightup cancel [Permission: lightup.cancel]
- /lightup undo [Permission: lightup.undo]

### Default Config:
https://github.com/LOOHP/LightUp/blob/main/src/main/resources/config.yml
